MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-28-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: PETER FORGIE, ESQ., LAW OFFICES OF CHARLES NAYLOR, 310.514.1200, FOR PLAINTIFF RAYNETTA RAYZETTA.
MARKER LOVELL, ESQ., GIBSON ROBB & LINDH, 415.348.6000, FOR DEFNEDNANT FISHERMAN'S WHARF BAY CRUISE CORPORATION DBA RED & WHITE FLEET.
